children.name: Jean II du Chasteler, Seigneur de Biellaing

zh.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-Liétard是Baudouin de Hénin-Liétard和Mathilde de Luxembourg van Limburg的女兒，出生。她和Jean I du Chasteler至少有2個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-Liétard是Baudouin de Hénin-Liétard和Mathilde de Luxembourg van Limburg的女儿，出生。她和Jean I du Chasteler至少有2个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fontaine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Normand, Pierre, Emile, Fernand, Lucien, Marcel, Adelard, Henri, Jacques, Laurent.

French and Walloon: topographic name for someone living near a spring or well, from Old French fontaine, from Late Latin fontana, a derivative of Latin fons (see Font ); or a habitational name from Fontaine, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fountaine .
Shortened form of French   Lafontaine  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Fontenot
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Ulysse, Andrus, Alcide, Andre, Edouard, Lucien, Marise, Monique, Remy.

French: variant of Fonteneau (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a topographic name from a diminutive of Old French fontaine ‘spring, well’ (see Fontaine ), or a habitational name from any of several places mainly in the westcentral part of France so named. The surname Fontenot is very rare in France.
History: Jean-Louis Fonteneau/Fontenot from Montierneuf in Vienne, France, married Louise-Angélique Henry in Mobile, AL, in 1726.

variants.name: Fontenelle
meanings: French: topographic name from a diminutive of Old French fontaine ‘spring, well’ (see Fontaine ), or a habitational name from (La) Fontenelle, the name of several places in various parts of France, of the same origin.

variants.name: Fontenette
meanings: French: topographic name from a diminutive of Old French fontaine ‘spring, well’ (see Fontaine ), or a habitational name from Fontenette, the name of several places mainly in the central part of France, of the same origin.

variants.name: Fountain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from one or more of the places in France named Fontaine, Fonteyne, or Lafontaine (see   Fontaine  ).

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a spring or well, from Middle English fontayne (Old French fontaine) ‘spring, fountain’, sometimes with a plural -s, and synonymous with Well , of which Fountain(es) may sometimes have been a translation.

variants.name: Font
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Luis, Miguel, Rafael, Eduardo, Raul, Eugenio, Pedro, Roberto, Aida.
Catalan and southern French: topographic name for someone living near a spring or well, Catalan and Occitan font ‘spring, well’ (from Latin fons, genitive fontis).
English: variant of   Fant  .

variants.name: Fontan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Angel, Benigno, Carlos, Jose, Juana, Manuel, Pedro, Adolfo, Aida, Alfredo, Candido, Emilia.
Spanish and Galician (Fontán): habitational name from any of the many places called Fontán, from fontán ‘spring’.
French: variant of   Fontaine  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-Liétard was born as the daughter of Baudouin de Hénin-Liétard and Mathilde de Luxembourg van Limburg. She had at least 2 sons with Jean I du Chasteler.

fr.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-Liétard est née, fille de Baudouin de Hénin-Liétard et Mathilde de Luxembourg van Limburg. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Jean I du Chasteler.

de.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-Liétard wurde, als Tochter von Baudouin de Hénin-Liétard und Mathilde de Luxembourg van Limburg geboren. Sie hatte mit Jean I du Chasteler mindestens 2 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-Liétard è nata il come figlia di Baudouin de Hénin-Liétard e Mathilde de Luxembourg van Limburg. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Jean I du Chasteler.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-LiétardはBaudouin de Hénin-LiétardとMathilde de Luxembourg van Limburgの娘として生まれた。彼女はJean I du Chastelerとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-Liétard(은)는 Baudouin de Hénin-Liétard(와)과 Mathilde de Luxembourg van Limburg의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Jean I du Chasteler(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-Liétard nasceu filha de Baudouin de Hénin-Liétard e Mathilde de Luxembourg van Limburg. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Jean I du Chasteler.

ru.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-Liétard родилась. Её родителей звали Baudouin de Hénin-Liétard и Mathilde de Luxembourg van Limburg. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Jean I du Chasteler.

es.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Fontaine de Hénin-Liétard nació como hija de Baudouin de Hénin-Liétard y Mathilde de Luxembourg van Limburg. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Jean I du Chasteler.
